name: Spotify
description: Control Spotify playback, browse listening history, get personalized recommendations, manage playlists, and discover new music. Requires Spotify OAuth setup in the APIs page.
examples: What am I listening to right now?
Show me my recently played tracks
What are my most listened to artists?
Search for Daft Punk on Spotify
Recommend me some music based on my taste
Add this song to my workout playlist

commands.name: spotify
commands.shortDescription: Check what's playing and recent Spotify activity
commands.description: Call spotify_now_playing to check if something is currently playing on Spotify. Then call spotify_recently_played to show the last 5 tracks. If something is playing, highlight the track name, artist, and album. Present recent plays in a clean list. Be conversational and music-friendly.

commands.name: vibes
commands.description: Use spotify_top_items to get the user's top tracks and artists (short term), then call spotify_recommendations seeded with those items. Present 8-10 recommended tracks with artist names. Group them by mood or genre if possible. Offer to add them to a playlist.
